docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY CO. ATTN: MR. FRANK LANAK NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-17-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-28-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PATIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $612.42. CONT'D FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
